tools.name: run_campaign
tools.description: Create a campaign and return campaign_id + first telemetry snapshot.

tools.name: get_campaign
tools.description: Read campaign status with optional leads + scorecard (progressive disclosure).

tools.name: get_lead
tools.description: Fetch one lead with evidence by scanning campaign leads.

tools.name: export_leads
tools.description: Export campaign leads as JSON or CSV payload.

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit user feedback for model improvement loop.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate run cost before campaign launch (model-based estimate, not billable).
